headline: Seagate Stock And The Bet On A Denser Future
summary: Management is promising structural growth without shipping more drives, and the market is buying it. But the real test of that high-tech promise is around the corner.

raw.headline: Seagate Stock And The Bet On A Denser Future

headline: NetApp Stock Pauses After Earnings; Support At 10-Week Line Could Provide Entry
summary: NetApp is testing a key line after a big earnings pop in late May, as investors seek beneficiaries of demand for data storage.

raw.headline: NetApp Stock Pauses After Earnings; Support At 10-Week Line Could Provide Entry

headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves a Second Chance and 2 We Ignore
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

raw.headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves a Second Chance and 2 We Ignore
